ddls:
CREATE TABLE "traffic_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the traffic station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the traffic station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the station */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the traffic station the sensor is located at */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., inductive loop, camera) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES traffic_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_flow" (
  "flow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic flow record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the traffic station where the data was collected */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data collection */,
  "total_flow" INTEGER /* Total flow per observation interval */,
  "avg_density" REAL /* Average density of traffic */,
  "avg_speed" REAL /* Average speed of traffic */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction of traffic flow */,
  "lane" INTEGER /* Lane number where the data was collected */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_flow_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES traffic_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the traffic station where the incident occurred */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the incident */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of incident (e.g., accident, roadwork) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the incident */,
  "estimated_duration" INTEGER /* Estimated duration of the incident in minutes */,
  "response_team" TEXT /* Name or ID of the response team handling the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES traffic_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_signal_timing" (
  "timing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timing plan */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the traffic station where the plan is applied */,
  "timing_plan" TEXT /* Details of the timing plan */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the plan becomes effective */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the timing plan */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the timing plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_signal_timing_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES traffic_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_camera_feeds" (
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each camera feed */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the traffic station where the camera is located */,
  "feed_url" TEXT /* URL of the camera feed */,
  "feed_type" TEXT /* Type of camera feed (e.g., video, image) */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last active feed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the camera feed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_camera_feeds_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES traffic_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "road_network" (
  "road_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each road */,
  "road_name" TEXT /* Name of the road */,
  "road_type" TEXT /* Type of road (e.g., highway, arterial) */,
  "speed_limit" INTEGER /* Speed limit on the road */,
  "traffic_lanes" INTEGER /* Number of traffic lanes on the road */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("road_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "road_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each road link */,
  "road_id" INTEGER /* ID of the road the link belongs to */,
  "from_node" INTEGER /* Node at the start of the link */,
  "to_node" INTEGER /* Node at the end of the link */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the link */,
  "speed_limit" INTEGER /* Speed limit on the link */,
  "traffic_lanes" INTEGER /* Number of traffic lanes on the link */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_road_links_road_id FOREIGN KEY ("road_id") REFERENCES road_network ("road_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node */,
  "x_coordinate" REAL /* X-coordinate of the node */,
  "y_coordinate" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the node */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the node */,
  "node_type" TEXT /* Type of node (e.g., intersection, roundabout) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trajectories" (
  "trajectory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trajectory */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the trajectory point */,
  "x_coordinate" REAL /* X-coordinate of the trajectory point */,
  "y_coordinate" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the trajectory point */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the vehicle at the trajectory point */,
  "acceleration" REAL /* Acceleration of the vehicle at the trajectory point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trajectory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trajectories_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., car, truck) */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number of the vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Name of the driver */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the driver */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the driver */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the driver */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the driver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "driver_vehicle_associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the association started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the association ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_vehicle_associations_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_vehicle_associations_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)
